intro: Fresh tracks cut a clean line across the new snow, still crisp at the edges. Whatever made them is not far ahead.
title: Tracks in the Snow
description: Fresh snow holds tracks no summer forest could. Read the prints and name who made them: get it right and you corner it for a richer cache, get it wrong and you still run it down for a smaller find. Or leave the trail be.

1.label: Read the tracks
1.tooltip: (+) Name the maker. Right = a richer cache, wrong = a lesser find (never nothing)
1.selected: You crouch over the prints, reading their size and spacing, and set off down the trail...

2.label: Leave the trail
2.selected: You leave the tracks to the snow and move on.
